title: Belisarius Cawl
homeworld: Unknown — active since the Great Crusade
specialty: Genetic engineering · xenotech integration · Primaris Space Marine development
lore: Belisarius Cawl is possibly the most brilliant and most controversial figure in the Adeptus Mechanicus — an Archmagos Dominus who has survived for over ten thousand years through increasingly radical self-modification and distributed cognition across hundreds of linked sub-minds.

On the orders of Roboute Guilliman before the Primarch's internment in the Throne of Aeons, Cawl spent ten millennia developing the Primaris Space Marines — an improved breed of Astartes with three additional gene-seed organs and enhanced physiology, kept secret until the Indomitus Crusade.

Cawl's methods are deeply heretical by Mechanicus orthodoxy — he freely integrates xenos technology, performs experiments forbidden by the Sixteen Universal Laws, and his internal architecture is so complex that no other Tech-Priest can fully audit what lies within him. Yet his results have repeatedly saved the Imperium.
